name: verified-code
summary: Generate, review, debug, and refactor code in any language. Requires EVOLINK_API_KEY. Transmits workspace files to api.evolink.ai. Powered by Evolink.ai
description: A comprehensive code assistant that generates working code (not templates), reviews for security/performance issues, debugs errors with context, and refactors legacy codebases. Supports Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java, and C/C++. Reads workspace files and sends them to api.evolink.ai for processing. Executes syntax checks and tests locally.
author: EvoLinkAI
